title: Resource Browser (Project Editor)
text: Resource Browser (Project Editor) Create new main development objects (modeled entities, modeled components, components, and libraries) and add new and existing objects and files to the Project. Tabs Templates —lists templates for creating main development objects in this project. Model —lists existing modeled components that can be used to create components that inherit definitions from the modeled component. Objects —lists existing development objects that can be added to the current project. Tables —facility for creating modeled entities by loading definitions from an existing database. How to Add Objects from the Resource Browser Filter and Search for Objects in Resource Browser Import Data Definitions From a DBMS Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
